title: Masterclass Series in Tokyo
description: Sharing vocal techniques and stagecraft with the next generation of performers...
body:
In addition to his performing schedule, Vitaly Yushmanov is dedicated to nurturing the next generation of vocal talent. This autumn, he will lead a series of masterclasses at the Tokyo College of Music.

The sessions will focus on vocal technique, interpretation of the Slavic repertoire, and stagecraft. Vitaly's approach combines traditional methods with his own extensive experience on the international stage, providing students with invaluable insights into the world of professional opera.
